creator: kwm@FreeBSD.org
text: Hello thank you for the update. I just have a question about the extra patches, since I'm not 100% sure that we need to include them. As the author mentioned in https://github.com/strukturag/libde265/pull/372 that the CVE's been fixed in another way. And it seems that these 3 pull requests won't be included I think. Could you explain why you want to include these anyway?
